name: Image Converter — Clipboard, Drag Reorder, EXIF

features.label: Copy to Clipboard
features.desc: Copy any converted image directly to clipboard via Clipboard API. Auto-converts to PNG for clipboard compatibility. Copy button per image + Copy All button in header.
features.howto: Image Converter → Convert → Copy button on each image

features.label: Drag to Reorder
features.desc: Drag the handle on the left of each image to reorder them. Conversion and download order follows the new arrangement.
features.howto: Image Converter → drag the ≡ handle on any image row

features.label: Image Metadata Viewer (EXIF)
features.desc: Click Info on any image to see full metadata: filename, type, size, dimensions, megapixels, aspect ratio, last modified. For JPEG/TIFF: camera make/model, date taken, ISO, aperture, shutter speed, focal length, flash, GPS coordinates.
features.howto: Image Converter → Info button on any image
